name: mcp-kinetic-gain
description: MCP server and CLI for all eleven Kinetic Gain Protocol Suite specs + v0.1.0 implementation tooling preview. One Claude Desktop config, 63 tools (47 spec + 16 implementation-preview): AEO Protocol, Prompt Provenance, Agent Cards, AI Evidence Format, MCP Tool Cards, AI Tutor Cards, Student AI Disclosure, Classroom AI AUP, Clinical AI Disclosure, AI Incident Card, AI Procurement Decision Card + ed25519 attestation verification, hash-chained audit-stream events (offline AND live against a running audit-stream-py), cross-spec drift detection, Decision Intelligence preview. v0.7.0 adds live audit-stream tools so Claude can emit/query/verify governance events directly from chat. Headline tools: aup_check_compliance, decision_card_validate, decision_card_to_policy_bundle, attestation_verify, suite_doc_drift, audit_chain_verify, audit_event_emit. CLI mode validates Suite JSON files against the bundled zod schemas.
author: Miz Causevic
